channel.title: West Seattle Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for West Seattle Events

item.title: Trivia Night @ Alki
item.description:
Wednesday, March 4, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: 2536 Alki Avenue Southwest, Seattle, WA, 98116

Teams up to 6 people welcome and free to play with prizes for the top 2 teams.

From Future Primitive Brewing

item.title: Medicare Made Clear
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: West Seattle Branch

Everything you need to know about Medicare!

From SPL - West Seattle Branch

Event details

item.title: Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: 3803 Delridge Way SW, Seattle

Weekly open mic with full backline provided and 16-track recording available. Free sign-up.

From Skylark Cafe — Wednesday Open Mic

Event details

item.title: Preschool Story Time
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: West Seattle Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 3-5 and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

From SPL - West Seattle Branch

Event details

item.title: West Seattle Farmers Market
item.description:
Sunday, March 29, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: California Ave SW & SW Alaska St, Seattle

Year-round Sunday farmers market in the West Seattle Junction. Local produce, artisan foods, and community events.

From West Seattle Farmers Market

Event details
